code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut start = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    if v == 10
      let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
      if string.len(string.trim(line)) > 0
        last = line
        found = true
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start < n
  let tail = string.substring(input, start, n)
  if string.len(string.trim(tail)) > 0
    last = tail
    found = true
  end
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
